entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop affected by stalk and top rot disease

entities.name: STALK AND TOP ROT
entities.description: A disease characterized by wilting, yellowing, and rotting of stalks and top parts of the plant

entities.name: PANTNAGAR
entities.description: A location in India where the disease was observed

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the disease report originated

entities.name: WILTING OF APICAL LEAVES
entities.description: A symptom of stalk and top rot disease

entities.name: YELLOWING OF LOWER LEAVES
entities.description: A symptom of stalk and top rot disease

entities.name: BROWN STALKS
entities.description: A symptom of stalk and top rot disease

entities.name: ROTTEN INTERNODES
entities.description: A symptom of stalk and top rot disease

entities.name: BACTERIAL EXUDATE
entities.description: A substance produced by bacteria found in the stalks of infected plants

entities.name: ERWINIA CHRYSANTHEMI PV. ZEAE
entities.description: The bacterium identified as the cause of stalk and top rot in sorghum
